attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT           
	MOFTH.BATCH_ID                    
	,MOFTH.AMORTIZATION_START_DATE     
	,MOFTH.ASSET_ID                    
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE1                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE10                 
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE11                 
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE12                 
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE13                 
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE14                 
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE15                 
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE2                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE3                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE4                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE5                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE6                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE7                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE8                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE9                  
	,MOFTH.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY_CODE     
	,MOFTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE              
	,MOFTH.CALLING_INTERFACE           
	,MOFTH.DATE_EFFECTIVE              
	,MOFTH.GES_UPDATE_DATE             
	,MOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME                 
	,MOFTH.INVOICE_TRANSACTION_ID      
	,MOFTH.LAST_UPDATED_BY             
	,MOFTH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE            
	,MOFTH.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN           
	,MOFTH.MASS_REFERENCE_ID           
	,MOFTH.MASS_TRANSACTION_ID         
	,MOFTH.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_DATE_ENTERED    
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID       
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_KEY             
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_NAME            
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE         
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE       
	,MOFTH.CREATE_DATETIME             
	,MOFTH.ACTION_CODE                 
	,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE   
 FROM
      ( 
      SELECT
	     SMTH.BATCH_ID                    
		,SMTH.AMORTIZATION_START_DATE     
		,SMTH.ASSET_ID                    
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE1                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE10                 
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE11                 
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE12                 
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE13                 
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE14                 
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE15                 
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE2                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE3                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE4                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE5                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE6                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE7                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE8                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE9                  
		,SMTH.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY_CODE     
		,SMTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE              
		,SMTH.CALLING_INTERFACE           
		,SMTH.DATE_EFFECTIVE              
		,SMTH.GES_UPDATE_DATE             
		,SMTH.GLOBAL_NAME                 
		,SMTH.INVOICE_TRANSACTION_ID      
		,SMTH.LAST_UPDATED_BY             
		,SMTH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE            
		,SMTH.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN           
		,SMTH.MASS_REFERENCE_ID           
		,SMTH.MASS_TRANSACTION_ID         
		,SMTH.SOURCE_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID
		,SMTH.TRANSACTION_DATE_ENTERED    
		,SMTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID       
		,SMTH.TRANSACTION_KEY             
		,SMTH.TRANSACTION_NAME            
		,SMTH.TRANSACTION_SUBTYPE         
		,SMTH.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE       
		,SMTH.CREATE_DATETIME             
		,SMTH.ACTION_CODE  
	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_TXN_HEADERS SMTH
      )MOFTH    
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC  
           ON (MOFTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
           AND MOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME  
           AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
				)                                             
WHERE NOT EXISTS
    (SELECT 1 
        FROM 
             $$WORKDB.W_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION WFAT,
             $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	 WHERE 
			WFAT.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
			AND   NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = MOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME
			AND MOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID = WFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
)

SELECT 
	SMFAT.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY 
	,EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER as BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
	,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE as BK_COMPANY_CODE 
	,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_DATE_ENTERED as BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTM 
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE as BK_FA_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD 
	,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CD 
	,MOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT 
	,MOFTH.DATE_EFFECTIVE AS FA_TRANSACTION_EFFECTIVE_DT
	,MOFTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE AS DD_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
    , 'I' AS ACTION_CODE
    , 'I' AS DML_TYPE
  FROM
	( 
	SELECT 
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		ASSET_ID,
		TRANSACTION_DATE_ENTERED ,
		TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DATE_EFFECTIVE
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_TXN_HEADERS 
	UNION ALL
		SELECT 
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		ASSET_ID,
		TRANSACTION_DATE_ENTERED ,
		TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DATE_EFFECTIVE
	FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_TXN_HEADERS
	)MOFTH                                                
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_B EFAB  
          ON (EFAB.ASSET_ID=MOFTH.ASSET_ID 
	      AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME=MOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC  
           ON (MOFTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
           AND MOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME  
           AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE')                  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC    
          ON MOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB          
          ON (EFABC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT 
          AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOB.SS_CODE) 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_CATEGORY_BOOKS  EFACB       
          ON (MOFTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = EFACB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
          AND EFAB.ASSET_CATEGORY_ID = EFACB.CATEGORY_ID 
	      AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME = EFACB.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION SMFAT 
	  ON ( SMFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT = MOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID
	  AND SMFAT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA  
          ON(EFACB.ASSET_COST_ACCOUNT_CCID = NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT 
         AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA                 
	  ON (NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER 
          AND NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
          AND NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD = NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE) 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_TYPE NFTT
          ON (NFTT.BK_FA_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD = MOFTH.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE)

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,SMOFTH.SS_CODE) + MAX_VAL FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY,
      		 SMOFTH.SS_CODE,SMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID 
  FROM ( 
		  SELECT STMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CODE
		  FROM
		 		(
					SELECT TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,BOOK_TYPE_CODE FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_TXN_HEADERS
				)STMOFTH
		  INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC  
	           ON (STMOFTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
	           AND STMOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME  
	           AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
	           )    
		  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	       	  ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME
     	)SMOFTH,
       ( SELECT COALESCE (MAX (FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION 
       ) SFTHMAX
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM  $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION SMFAT
           WHERE SMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID = SMFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
             AND SMOFTH.SS_CODE = SMFAT.SS_CD)
